title: [GrandCentral] Represent GrandCentral interfaces as a special FIRRTL Module
body:
This is a prototype implementation of representing GrandCentral interfaces with a special FIRRTL Module. 


Proposed changes:
1. The top level interface is represented using a module, that is instantiated in the companion.
2. Every interface signal is represented using a wire inside the module.
3. All nested interfaces are represented using `firrtl.bundle`.
4. The module has one port for each leaf ground type interface signals.
5. Dataflow is expressed through explicit assignments and connect.

To Represent the nested interfaces using `firrtl.bundle`, requires to store the interface name and field description.
This PR adds,
1. A `StringAttr` to each `BundleType::BundleElement` for the field description.
2. A `StringAttr` to each `BundleType` for the name of the `firrtl.bundle`.
The description and bundle name attributes are only internally exposed and are generated during `LowerAnnotations`.

For example, the `mlir` to generate the following system verilog interface is shown in the next code block.


```verilog
module Companion(
  input MyView_signed__bore
);

  MyInterface MyView();
  assign MyView.signed = MyView_signed__bore;
endmodule

interface MyInterface;
  logic signed_0;
endinterface
```
MLIR , using a new op `firrtl.interface` and no explicit assignments.

```mlir
firrtl.module private @Companion(in %MyView_signed__bore: !firrtl.uint<1>) {
    %signed = firrtl.wire : !firrtl.uint<1>
    %MyView__interFacePort_0 = firrtl.instance MyView @MyInterface(in _interFacePort_0: !firrtl.uint<1>)
    firrtl.strictconnect %MyView__interFacePort_0, %signed : !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.connect %signed, %MyView_signed__bore : !firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
  firrtl.interface @MyInterface(in %_interFacePort_0: !firrtl.uint<1>) {
    %signed = firrtl.wire : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
```
TODO
1. Fix the YAML generation
2. Completely move all the logic from the GrandCentral pass to LowerAnnotations, and remove it from the pipeline.
3. Add verifier to `firrtl.interface`
4. Add lit tests for `LowerToHW`
